message:
refactor(tests): migrate snapshot_engine, simulation from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 74 #[tokio::test] async tests across 2 files to #[test] with
run_async_test helper backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder:
- snapshot_engine.rs: 32 tests (completing partial migration from c7ed5c9b)
- simulation.rs: 42 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
